predicates.name: holds_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person holds Belgian nationality (directly stated as a background fact in the case).

predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is a foreigner because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

predicates.name: falls_under_community_free_movement_law
predicates.description: The person falls under Community law on free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not covered by Community free movement law.

predicates.name: present_on_territory
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory.

predicates.name: satisfies_access_or_residence_conditions
predicates.description: The person satisfies the conditions for access to or residence on the territory.

predicates.name: is_in_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The person is in illegal residence on the territory.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_procedure
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the member state responsible for examining the request for international protection.

predicates.name: reasons_to_assume_will_abscond
predicates.description: Reasons exist to assume that the foreigner will abscond.

predicates.name: risk_assessed_on_objective_criteria
predicates.description: The risk of absconding is assessed on the basis of one or more objective criteria listed in Article 1, paragraph 2.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the foreigner has been performed.

predicates.name: subject_to_qualifying_procedure
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure, an international protection procedure, or a responsible-member-state determination/transfer procedure.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: A risk of absconding exists for the foreigner, assessed individually on objective criteria.

predicates.name: no_application_criterion_met
predicates.description: The no-application criterion is met: the foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence, or did not submit a request for international protection within the required period.

predicates.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence.

predicates.name: did_not_submit_international_protection_request_in_time
predicates.description: The foreigner did not submit a request for international protection within the period provided by law.

predicates.name: false_information_criterion_met
predicates.description: The false-information criterion is met: the foreigner used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information
predicates.description: The foreigner used false or misleading information in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents
predicates.description: The foreigner used false or falsified documents in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: committed_fraud
predicates.description: The foreigner committed fraud in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_other_unlawful_means
predicates.description: The foreigner used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: non_cooperation_criterion_met
predicates.description: The non-cooperation criterion is met: the foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal.

predicates.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the relevant authorities.

predicates.name: non_compliance_criterion_met
predicates.description: The non-compliance criterion is met: the foreigner indicated non-compliance with or failed to comply with one or more specified measures.

predicates.name: indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_transfer_pushback_removal
predicates.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance with or failed to comply with a transfer, pushback, or removal measure.

predicates.name: indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban
predicates.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance with or failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance with or failed to comply with a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, pushback, or removal.

predicates.name: indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure_public_order
predicates.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance with or failed to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_measure_other_member_state
predicates.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance with or failed to comply with a measure taken by another member state equivalent to a transfer, pushback, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

predicates.name: entry_ban_criterion_met
predicates.description: The entry-ban criterion is met: the foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another member state that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to an entry ban in another member state that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: new_application_criterion_met
predicates.description: The new-application criterion is met: the foreigner submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a refusal, end-of-residence, or removal/pushback decision.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The foreigner submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, ending residence, or ordering pushback or removal.

predicates.name: concealed_fingerprints_criterion_met
predicates.description: The concealed-fingerprints criterion is met: the foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had already provided fingerprints in another state bound by European regulations on determining the responsible state.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: The foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had already provided fingerprints in another state bound by European regulations on determining the responsible state for examining an international protection request.

predicates.name: multiple_applications_criterion_met
predicates.description: The multiple-applications criterion is met: the foreigner submitted multiple international protection requests and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other member states resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The foreigner submitted multiple requests for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other member states resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_application_criterion_met
predicates.description: The concealed-prior-application criterion is met: the foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had previously submitted a request for international protection in another state bound by European regulations.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_application_in_other_state
predicates.description: The foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had previously submitted a request for international protection in another state bound by European regulations on determining the responsible state.

predicates.name: other_purposes_criterion_met
predicates.description: The other-purposes criterion is met: the foreigner declared or it appears from the file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a request for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: came_for_other_purposes
predicates.description: The foreigner declared or it appears from the file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a request for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: manifestly_unfounded_appeal_criterion_met
predicates.description: The manifestly-unfounded-appeal criterion is met: the foreigner is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The foreigner is identified: they hold a valid travel document, passport, or identity document; or have been recognised as a national by their country's authority willing to issue a laissez-passer; or fall under nationalities for which the minister may directly issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: holds_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The foreigner is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_authority
predicates.description: The foreigner has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The foreigner falls under the category of nationalities for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer directly.

predicates.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria listed in Article 1, paragraph 2 is met for the foreigner.
